scripts.build: open-slide build && for f in dist/index.html dist/assets/index-*.css dist/assets/*.js; do sed -i '' 's|/assets/|/open-slide-deck/assets/|g' "$f"; done && echo '<!DOCTYPE html><meta charset="utf-8"><meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=/open-slide-deck/"><link rel="canonical" href="/open-slide-deck/">' > dist/404.html
